paneContent:
в—Џ Acknowledged вЂ” broadcast two-way active with Leader, Form, Data, opal-warbler, Scaffold, Charts, Data. Standing
  by.


вќЇ Branding is a bit too... ligth and bubbly? Gradients a bit annoying if I'm honest, and you're lacking contrast on
   the text at places


в—Џ Edit Branding.jsx +17 -26
  в”” src/prototypes/main.folder/StartupSignup/Branding.jsx


в—Џ update summary widget + save output (shell)
  в”‚ export STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:1236 STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID=storyboard-demo
  в”‚ STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-bqdgr2
  в”‚ curl -s -m 5 -X PATCH "$STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL/_storyboard/canvas/widget" \
  в”‚ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  в”‚ -d '{"name":"storyboard-demo","widgetId":"markdown-xpnck7","props":{"content":"### Branding.jsx вЂ¦
  в”” 12 lines...


в—Џ Toned it down. Changes:

   - Removed all gradients (background + avatar) and the blurred orb decorations
   - Solid indigo-950 background вЂ” flat, calm
   - Body text is now white (was indigo-100/90 and indigo-50 вЂ” washed out)
   - Indigo-500 used only as small accents (logo tile, check bullets, avatar) вЂ” no more translucent white/15
  ring-on-glass stuff
   - Testimonial is a quiet bordered card (border-indigo-800 on indigo-900/60) instead of glassmorphism

  Same content and layout; just calmer and readable. Summary widget on canvas updated.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.6.0 [вЋ‡ 0.6.0*%]                                                @README.md
